overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist riding a mechanical Sunwing mount through a vast mountainous jungle landscape during golden hour. The camera follows from behind as the mount soars over rocky peaks, dives through misty valleys, and banks around cliff faces in a seamless aerial traversal sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude mountain range with snow-capped peaks

agents.ego_description: soaring high above mountain peaks on a mechanical Sunwing, maintaining steady altitude while surveying the expansive landscape below

entered.detail: layered rocky mountains with varying elevations stretching across the horizon
distant mountain peak with white snow visible on the summit
low-lying clouds and mist filling the valleys between mountain ridges
steep rock faces with sparse vegetation visible on the mountainsides

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude flight over a vast mountain range during golden hour. The camera maintains a steady forward trajectory above mist-filled valleys, with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance and rocky cliffs passing by on the right. The landscape below shows sparse vegetation and deep canyons shrouded in atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest canopy at treetop level

events.description: begins descending rapidly from high altitude to skim just above the forest canopy

agents.ego_description: diving down from the mountain peaks to fly at treetop level, weaving between tall trees and navigating the dense forest canopy

entered.detail: dense green treetops filling the lower portion of the frame with individual trees visible
tall coniferous trees rising up on the left side of the flight path

segments.scene_description: The mount descends from the high peaks into a dense forest environment, transitioning from open sky to semi-covered space as the camera skims just above the treetops. Tall pine trees flank the flight path on both sides while the mountain range remains visible in the distant background. The lighting remains warm and golden as the flight continues through the canopy level.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley with primitive wooden settlement and waterfall

events.description: exits dense forest canopy into open valley revealing settlement structures below
quest marker appears indicating discovery of 'The Valley of the Fallen' location

agents.ego_description: flying through a misty valley revealing wooden settlement structures, a waterfall, and a river below while maintaining steady forward momentum

entered.detail: primitive wooden structures and buildings situated on the valley floor near the river
water cascading down rocks into a river running through the valley
rope and wood bridge structure spanning across part of the valley
dark smoke rising from the settlement area indicating fires or activity

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the forest, the scene opens into a wide valley containing a primitive wooden settlement with smoke rising from structures. A waterfall and river are visible below as the mount flies forward, revealing the 'Valley of the Fallen' location. The environment transitions from dense vegetation to open grassland with scattered trees and cliff faces on the valley edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff faces and open sky with pink clouds

events.description: executes sharp banking turn to the left, tilting the mount sideways
begins ascending toward a massive cliff face while maintaining forward speed

agents.ego_description: executing banking turns around the valley and climbing toward a massive cliff face while the sun illuminates the rock formations with warm golden light

entered.detail: massive vertical rock wall with layered sedimentary formations and warm orange lighting
jagged rocky outcrops and peaks along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment features dynamic aerial maneuvers as the mount banks sharply around the valley and climbs toward an imposing cliff face. The camera tilts with the banking motion, revealing the expansive sky filled with pink-tinged clouds. The mountain range shifts to the left as the flight path curves, ending with an ascent along the massive rock wall illuminated by the setting sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins high above a misty mountain range and descends into a lush valley before climbing toward a sunlit cliff. It begins with a steady forward glide over snow-capped peaks and deep, haze-shrouded canyons under the warm glow of golden hour. As the mount descends, the open sky gives way to a dense forest where the camera skims just above the canopy of tall pine trees. The scene then opens into the wide Valley of the Fallen, transitioning from thick vegetation to open grasslands featuring a primitive wooden settlement, a river, and a waterfall. Finally, the camera banks sharply to reveal pink-tinged clouds before curving upward in a steep ascent along a massive rock wall illuminated by the setting sun.
